# Cozumel Island Transfers

> Licensed private ground-transfer operator in Cozumel, Mexico. Family-run since 2015. Serves all four cruise piers (TMM Terminal, Puerta Maya, Punta Langosta, International Pier) and Cozumel International Airport (CZM). All-inclusive fixed prices in USD. No hidden fees. Free cancellation up to 24h before pickup.

## Company

- **Legal name:** Cozumel Island Transfers, S. de R.L. de C.V.
- **Régimen:** Persona Moral · Régimen General 601
- **Location:** Cozumel, Quintana Roo, México
- **Founded:** 2015
- **Fleet:** 26 private vans, Sprinters, and Transit vans (11–20 passenger capacity each)
- **Drivers:** Bilingual English/Spanish, licensed, uniformed
- **Contact:** WhatsApp +52 987 114 6853 · hello@cozumelislandtransfers.com
- **Hours:** Office 6 AM – 10 PM Cozumel time · WhatsApp +52 987 114 6853
- **Reviews:** 🏆 Travelers' Choice on TripAdvisor, 4.8★ from 35 verified reviews

## Audience

Cruise passengers disembarking at Cozumel's four cruise piers AND travelers arriving at Cozumel International Airport (CZM). We serve guests from every major cruise line — Carnival, Royal Caribbean, Norwegian, Celebrity, MSC, Disney, Princess, Holland America, and all others.

## Services

1. **Cruise port transfers** (round-trip): from the cruise pier to your destination of choice, with real-time ship tracking so we're at the pier when you walk off. Return-on-time guarantee — refund if we make you late.
2. **Airport transfers** (one-way or round-trip): meet & greet at CZM terminal exit, door-to-door to your hotel/Airbnb, real-time flight tracking.

## Vehicles & pricing (all-inclusive, round-trip)

| Tier | Capacity | Round-trip USD | One-way USD |
|------|----------|----------------|-------------|
| Van | 1–8 passengers | $369 | $245 |
| L Van | 9–14 passengers | $425 | $285 |
| XL Van | 15–18 passengers | $549 | $369 |
| Coach | 19–20 passengers | $609 | $409 |
| Private Bus | 21–40 passengers | $899 | $599 |

All prices are per vehicle (not per person), final, USD, include all taxes and fees. Same flat rate anywhere on the island.

## Destinations served

- **Tierra Maya** (Mayan cultural preserve, our own venue — cacao/honey/tortilla/mezcal experiences) — 15 min from cruise port
- **Mr. Sancho's Beach Club** — all-inclusive food/drinks/beach, 15 min south
- **Chankanaab National Park** — snorkel reef, dolphin lagoon, botanical garden, 10 min south
- **Nachi Cocom Beach Club** — exclusive 130-guest cap, 20 min south
- **Paradise Beach Cozumel** — inflatable aqua park, 15 min south
- **Buccanos at Vista del Mar** — quieter north-side beach club, 10 min from port
- **San Gervasio Mayan Ruins** — Cozumel's largest archaeological site, 20 min inland
- **KUZA Beach & Adventure Park** — Cozumel's first theme park
- Custom destinations (hotel, Airbnb, ferry to Playa del Carmen, anywhere on the island)

## Cancellation & refund policy

- Free cancellation up to 24 hours before pickup
- Cruise reroute or port skip: full refund, no questions, no fees
- We monitor your ship's itinerary daily

## Cruise piers served

- TMM Terminal (Terminal Marítima de Maya)
- Puerta Maya (Carnival, Princess, Holland America)
- Punta Langosta (smaller ships, downtown San Miguel)
- International Pier (Royal Caribbean, Norwegian, MSC, Celebrity)

## Bookings

- **Direct:** https://cozu.netlify.app/#book or WhatsApp +52 987 114 6853
- **Viator:** Listed (booking direct saves ~25% vs Viator's price)

## Why book direct

- Lower price than Viator / cruise-line excursions (~25% cheaper)
- Real human answers WhatsApp during office hours
- Real-time ship & flight tracking
- Return-on-time refund guarantee
- 4.8★ Travelers' Choice on TripAdvisor since 2015
- Same vans, same drivers as third-party listings, lower price

## Languages

English (primary), Spanish

## Service area

Cozumel Island (San Miguel de Cozumel), Quintana Roo, México
